warnings: Explanation packets are derived from a single seeded case; explanations are bounded by available evidence.
next_recommended_input is a recommendation to the canonical owner; MET does not adopt or run the recommended action.
failure_prevented: A new engineer needing >15 minutes to understand what failed, why, where in the loop, and what to do next.
signal_improved: Each top failure mode and risk has an artifact-backed explanation packet with what failed, why it matters, evidence, and next recommended input.

packets.title: Eval coverage gap (long-horizon replay + full certification set)
packets.failure_prevented: Promotion gated on partial evaluation evidence with no clear pointer to the missing dimensions.
packets.signal_improved: Single-screen explanation: what failed, why, where, evidence, next input.
packets.what_failed: EVL eval_summary_record reports coverage_status=partial with score=0.72 and missing_checks=[long_horizon_replay, full_certification_set]; downstream TPA and CDE inherit warn.
packets.why_it_matters: EVL is the gating leg for TPA and CDE; partial coverage forces observe-only enforcement and prevents any safe promotion path on this loop.
packets.next_recommended_input: Forward EVC-EVL-LONG-HORIZON-REPLAY and EVC-EVL-FULL-CERT-SET to EVL for adoption review (artifacts/dashboard_metrics/eval_candidate_record.json).
unknowns: Frequency of this failure mode across history (only one seeded case)
Effort to close the missing checks (estimated medium, not measured)
packets.debug_summary: Open eval_summary_record.json -> see coverage_status=partial, missing_checks list. Trace to control_decision_record.json -> promotion_gate=blocked. Trace to enforcement_action_record.json -> action=observe_only. Fix path is in EVC-EVL-* candidates.

packets.title: Certification incomplete forces SEL observe-only
packets.failure_prevented: Repeat observe-only enforcement with no clear pointer to the missing certification inputs.
packets.signal_improved: Single-screen explanation linking SEL observe-only to the certification-set gap and the proposed policy candidate signal.
packets.what_failed: SEL enforcement_action_record reports action=observe_only because the certification evidence set is partial; CDE control_decision_record records promotion_gate=blocked.
packets.why_it_matters: SEL cannot move out of observe_only without complete certification inputs; this gates every downstream promotion path.
packets.next_recommended_input: Forward POL-SEL-CERT-COMPLETENESS to SEL/GOV for policy review (artifacts/dashboard_metrics/policy_candidate_signal_record.json).
unknowns: Whether certification artifact schema has stable required-input set
Frequency of this failure mode across history
packets.debug_summary: Open enforcement_action_record.json -> action=observe_only and reason. Trace to eval_summary_record.json missing_checks=full_certification_set. Fix path is POL-SEL-CERT-COMPLETENESS + EVC-EVL-FULL-CERT-SET.

packets.title: Replay coverage incomplete for long-horizon drift
packets.failure_prevented: Drift slipping through with no eval candidate naming the missing replay dimensions.
packets.signal_improved: Explanation links REP partial coverage to EVL coverage_status=partial and the proposed REP eval candidate.
packets.what_failed: REP replay_record reports missing distribution_shift and long_horizon dimensions; EVL coverage downgrades accordingly.
packets.why_it_matters: Without long-horizon and distribution-shift dimensions, replay cannot reproduce the conditions that EVL needs for full coverage; promotion remains blocked.
packets.next_recommended_input: Forward EVC-REP-LONG-HORIZON to EVL for adoption review (artifacts/dashboard_metrics/eval_candidate_record.json).
unknowns: Effort to add long_horizon and distribution_shift dimensions
Whether REP currently emits per-dimension status fields
packets.debug_summary: Open replay_record.json -> see dimensions_present and dimensions_missing. Cross-check eval_summary_record.json missing_checks. Fix path is EVC-REP-LONG-HORIZON.

packets.title: SLO budget context partial during promotion review
packets.failure_prevented: Promotion review proceeding without an explicit SLO consumed_ratio and budget_status.
packets.signal_improved: Explanation links the SLO partial-context warning to the proposed SLO eval candidate.
packets.what_failed: SLO slo_status_record carries partial budget context; consumed_ratio and budget_status fields are not first-class.
packets.why_it_matters: CDE consumes SLO context as part of its inputs; partial context masks reliability-budget pressure during promotion review.
packets.next_recommended_input: Forward EVC-SLO-BUDGET-CONTEXT to EVL for adoption review (artifacts/dashboard_metrics/eval_candidate_record.json).
unknowns: Whether existing SLO record has historical consumed_ratio data
packets.debug_summary: Open slo_status_record.json -> see partial budget context. Cross-check control_decision_record.json for SLO inputs. Fix path is EVC-SLO-BUDGET-CONTEXT.
